description.value:
Created when sídhe swap a human with inanimate objects given life. Perfect physical and mental copies with all memories of the person imitated. Believe they are the person they were made to copy.

Category: Folklore Monster

Characteristics

STR
50		 CON
50		 SIZ
50		 DEX
50		 INT
50		 POW
50

HP: 10 | DB: 0 | Build: 0 | Move: 10

Attacks

AttackSkillDamage
Unarmed or weapon45%1D3+DB or by weapon

Armor: None, but armor may be worn

Skills: Fast Talk 50%, Intimidate 50%, Listen 60%, Stealth 70%

Sanity Loss: None. 1/1D6 when seeing changeling's body resume original state

Special Abilities

  • Perfect Mimicry - all memories and physical appearance of original person
  • Strength of 20 Men - once per day, channel rage into 2-5 combat rounds with doubled DB
  • Truth Revealed in Death - body turns to material components (straw, sacks, buttons, etc.) then to dust
  • Cannot travel more than 5 Roman leagues from Britannia without dispelling
  • Can exist in Hibernia and Caledonia where sídhe also dwell
  • Can only be identified by behavior/actions, not Iron Society iron rings

special.sanpiLoss: None. 1/1D6 when seeing changeling's body resume original state
